scripts.dbml:validate: python3 -c "import sqlite3; conn=sqlite3.connect('backend/db/kali_notes.db'); tables=[r[0] for r in conn.execute(\"SELECT name FROM sqlite_master WHERE type='table'\").fetchall()]; print(f'Connected: {len(tables)} tables found')"
scripts.dbml:watch: fswatch -o backend/db/kali_notes.db | xargs -n1 -I{} python3 scripts/sqlite2dbml.py backend/db/kali_notes.db -o db.dbml
scripts.dbml:pull: git fetch kali0 backend && git show kali0/backend:backend/db/kali_notes.db > backend/db/kali_notes.db && echo '✅ Pulled from kali0/backend'
scripts.dbml:push: python3 scripts/sqlite2dbml.py backend/db/kali_notes.db -o db.dbml && curl -s -X PUT "https://api.dbdiagram.io/v1/diagrams/${DBDIAGRAM_DIAGRAM_ID:?Set env DBDIAGRAM_DIAGRAM_ID}" -H "Authorization: Bearer ${DBDIAGRAM_API_TOKEN:?Set env DBDIAGRAM_API_TOKEN}" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d "{\"content\": $(cat db.dbml | python3 -c 'import sys,json; print(json.dumps(sys.stdin.read()))')}" | python3 -m json.tool
